nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 5am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. Low around 62, with temperatures rising to around 65 overnight. East southeast wind 13 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 90, with temperatures falling to around 88 in the afternoon. South southeast wind 14 to 28 mph, with gusts as high as 40 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 9pm, then showers and thunderstorms between 9pm and 3am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 3am and 4am, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 4am and 5am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 59, with temperatures rising to around 63 overnight. South southeast wind 9 to 25 mph, with gusts as high as 39 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
